derivative_review.rule: Categorical knowledge, ideation, routing, and application limits are normalized into source positions, available variants, contextual performance hypotheses, and consequence maps while mechanisms, evidence notes, cases, examples, and execution metadata remain preserved.
derivative_review.scope: all packaged Markdown in the pinned source snapshot
